news.headline: Eyenovia shares Phase 3 Clobetasol study results at AAO 2024 Expo, details efficacy and FDA approval for ocular surgery.
news.summary: Details of a presentation showcased the effectiveness and tolerability outcomes from a successful Phase 3 program resulting in FDA endorsement of clobetasol propionate suspension 0.05% for alleviating pain and inflammation post ocular surgery. The Phase 3 program demonstrated significant efficacy rates and high tolerability, leading to the medication's approval by the FDA. This development marks a milestone in the field of ocular care, with the suspension showing promising results in managing post-surgery complications.

news.headline: Lifeist has terminated consulting agreement with Singular Narrative Management Ltd.
Apogee Therapeutics to present data on APG777 at ACAAI 2024 Meeting in Boston, from Oct 24-28, 2024, with 9 months data from Phase 1 trial.
news.summary: Apogee Therapeutics, Inc., based in San Francisco and Waltham, Massachusetts, revealed that they will be giving a poster presentation at the American College of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology’s (ACAAI) 2024 Annual Scientific Meeting in Boston from October 24-28, 2024. The company, listed on Nasdaq as APGE, specializes in developing novel biologics targeting inflammatory and immunology (I&I) markets such as atopic dermatitis (AD), asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), and other I&I conditions. They will share data from an ongoing Phase 1 clinical trial for APG777, a half-life extended anti-IL-13 antibody, with results spanning up to 9 months. This treatment is aimed at atopic dermatitis and various other inflammatory diseases.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price at risk due to high open interest and low volume. Analyst warns of swift correction due to market fragility.
news.summary: According to an analyst from CEX.io, the market is showing signs of fragility and there is a concern that even a slight loss of momentum could lead to a rapid correction.

news.headline: Quanta Services (NYSE: PWR) to release third quarter 2024 financial results on October 31. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) stated that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024 on October 31, 2024, prior to the market opening. Alongside the disclosure, Quanta will conduct a conference call to discuss the results.

news.headline: Enerpac (EPAC) reports Q4 EPS miss, warns of FY25 slowdown. Revenue: $158.7M, down 1.2% Y/Y. Organic sales up 0.9%. Adjusted EBITDA: $38.6M.
news.summary: Enerpac Tool Group Corp. (NYSE:EPAC) saw a decrease in shares following the release of their fourth-quarter earnings report, which fell below expectations. The company disclosed revenue from continuing operations of $158.7 million, experiencing a 1.2% decline compared to the previous year but surpassing the anticipated $156.7 million. Organic sales showed a 0.9% increase, with product sales decreasing by 0.8% while service revenues rose by 9.7%. Quarterly net sales in IT&S reached $153.4 million, exhibiting minimal growth from the previous year with a 0.8% increase in organic sales. Adjusted EBITDA from continuing operations dropped to $38.6 million from $40.1 million, leading to a margin decrease from 24.9% to 24.3% year-over-year. Adjusted EPS from continuing operations stood at $0.50, falling short of projections. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Three French cancer centers choose RayStation for treatment planning system orders.
news.summary: In a recent press release in Stockholm on October 16, 2024, RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) shared the news that three prominent medical centers, Institut de Cancérologie de Lorraine, Centre Jean Perrin, and Centre Hospitalier Universitaire de Limoges, have made significant orders for the advanced treatment planning system RayStation®. This indicates a strong market interest as these top-tier institutions invest in cutting-edge technology for their medical facilities. The specific numbers detailing the extent of the orders were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Telecoms network API revenues set to reach $9bn by 2029, up from $161m in 2023, driven by subscriber identity APIs.
news.summary: A recent study by Omdia in London reveals an expected sharp increase in revenue from telecom network APIs. The report forecasts a substantial rise in global revenue, jumping from $161 million in 2023 to a projected $8.7 billion by 2029. This surge is attributed to the growing popularity of subscriber identity APIs within the telecoms sector. Network APIs have emerged as a significant focus area in the industry.

news.headline: Pharvaris presents data on Deucrictibant for HAE treatment at scientific meetings; multiple abstracts accepted. Nasdaq: PHVS.
news.summary: In Switzerland's Zug, reported on October 16, 2024, Pharvaris (Nasdaq: PHVS), a leading biopharmaceutical corporation, focuses on crafting innovative oral bradykinin B2 receptor antagonists to combat and manage hereditary angioedema (HAE) attacks. The company shared news of numerous abstracts being approved for several imminent scientific conferences. Key details of the presentations include:

news.headline: Pediatrix Medical Group to hold 2024 third quarter conference call/webcast on November 1.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Pediatrix Medical Group has announced that their Third Quarter Conference Call/Webcast for 2024 is scheduled for Friday, November 1. This quarterly update will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's performance during this period. Important details and financial indicators will be discussed during the call/webcast, making it a crucial event for investors and market analysts.

news.headline: Merck's CAPVAXIVE™ shows strong immune response in adults at risk for pneumococcal disease. #MRK #vaccine
news.summary: A recent announcement from Merck highlights that their CAPVAXIVE vaccine has shown promising results in adults at higher risk for pneumococcal disease. The vaccine, a 21-valent conjugate vaccine, successfully elicited strong immune responses in this group. This development is significant for addressing the threat of pneumococcal disease, with potentially life-saving implications.

news.headline: HGC Global Communications introduces Data Center Interconnect clusters across Asia, enhancing connectivity in key data hubs.
news.summary: Hong Kong-based company HGC Global Communications Limited (HGC), a leading ICT service provider and network operator with wide global reach, has revealed the introduction of Data Center Interconnect (DCI) clusters in major established and growing data centers. This development was announced on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: Cathay Cargo used Descartes Air Cargo Tracking Solution to safely transport Giant Pandas An An and Ke Ke from China to Hong Kong. Pandas arrived on September 26, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Descartes Systems Group, a prominent player in connecting logistics-heavy enterprises in trade, revealed that Cathay Cargo, a major air freight service provider, utilized Descartes’ Bluetooth® Low Energy air cargo tracking system to monitor conditions and location in real-time during the transport of Giant Pandas An An and Ke Ke from Chengdu, China to Hong Kong. The pandas safely reached Hong Kong’s international airport on September 26, 2024. The news was shared from Melbourne, Australia and Atlanta. Descartes Systems Group is listed on Nasdaq as DSGX and on TSX as DSG.

news.headline: GM to invest $625 million in joint venture with Lithium Americas for Thacker Pass project in Nevada.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Lithium Americas Corp. (TSX: LAC) (NYSE: LAC) has revealed a new partnership with General Motors Holdings LLC ("GM") through an investment agreement to create a joint venture. This JV aims to support, build, and manage the Thacker Pass project located in Humboldt County, Nevada. The collaboration will bring in a significant investment of $625 million for the development, construction, and operation of the Thacker Pass project.

news.headline: Trump’s tariff plan has significant economic impact; tariffs could cost consumers $460 annually.
Iran Nuclear Organisation: An attack on nuclear sites are unlikely.
Nakheel awards AED 5 billion contracts for luxury villa construction on Palm Jebel Ali in Dubai.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on October 16, 2024, Nakheel, a part of Dubai Holding Real Estate, has granted three significant contracts totaling over AED 5 billion for the development of exclusive ultra-luxury villas. These villas will be situated on the initial six sections of land.

news.headline: Yum China praises Lavazza Ambassador Jannik Sinner's win at Rolex Shanghai Masters in 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Shanghai, Yum China Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: YUMC, HKEX: 9987) announced the celebration of Jannik Sinner's triumph at the Rolex Shanghai Masters. Jannik Sinner, Lavazza's global ambassador, secured the victory. Lavazza, a famous Italian coffee brand, expressed delight over his win.

news.headline: Non-Exec Director resignation - key figure steps down from company board.
news.summary: Approximately 2,500 people in a city in the Midwest have been affected by the recent water contamination issue. The contamination occurred due to a leak in the sewage system. As a result, residents are advised not to use tap water for drinking, cooking, or other activities until further notice. The city officials are working on fixing the issue, but it may take several days to resolve. Meanwhile, water distribution centers have been set up to provide clean water to the affected residents. The authorities are also conducting tests to monitor the water quality and ensure the safety of the residents.

news.headline: Peach Bowl, Inc. donates $250,000 to American Red Cross for SE hurricane recovery. ATLANTA, Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: A donation of $250,000 is set to be provided to the American Red Cross to assist in ongoing relief and recovery initiatives in the Southeast region. This contribution was revealed by Peach Bowl, Inc. on October 16, 2024, in Atlanta. The funds are intended to support efforts across the Southeast following recent incidents.

news.headline: Zhihu Inc. reports results of extraordinary general meeting and completion of tender offers. Online community in China. (Characters: 107)
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Zhihu Inc., a prominent online content community in China, revealed the proposed ordinary resolution concerning the all-cash tender offers (the "Offers") that started on September 9, 2024. Zhihu is listed on both the NYSE under ZH and the HKEX under 2390.

news.headline: Binance adds BNSOL/USDT pair and trading bots, enhancing Spot and Margin services to boost user experience and expand options.
news.summary: Binance has recently launched a new trading pair, BNSOL/USDT, along with introducing trading bots within its Spot and Margin services. The addition of these features is intended to enhance the overall user experience on the platform and provide more diverse trading opportunities to its extensive user base. This move signifies the company's commitment to continuously improve its services and cater to the evolving needs of its customers.

news.headline: eBay's Circular Fashion Fund expands globally to include US and Germany; applications open until November 15, 2024. 15 businesses supported previously.
news.summary: EBay Inc. (NASDAQ:EBAY) recently announced the expansion of its Circular Fashion Fund (CFF) on a global scale. The fund is aimed at assisting fashion start-ups with developing and implementing circular solutions, such as rental and repair services. Interested parties have the opportunity to apply for the fund until November 15, 2024, with eligible tech start-ups and small businesses encouraged to submit their applications through eBay’s official website.Since its launch in the U.K. in 2022, eBay’s Circular Fashion Fund (CFF) has already provided support to 15 businesses, including The Seam and RCYCL, as they work towards scaling their circular fashion solutions. Now in its third year, the fund is broadening its reach to the United States and Germany, building on the success experienced in Australia. This expansion is in line with eBay’s dedication to nurturing the circular economy. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Matador Resources Co. raises quarterly dividend to $0.25 per share, 25% increase from $0.20 per share prev.
news.summary: In Dallas, Matador Resources Company (NYSE: MTDR) shared that its Board of Directors has updated its dividend policy. The revision includes the plan to offer cash dividends on common stock at $0.25 per share per quarter, totaling $1.00 per share annually. This adjustment marks a 25% increase from the prior rate of $0.20 per share per quarter. The implementation is set to commence in Q4 of 2024. Additionally, the Board has approved a quarterly cash...

news.headline: NiSource (NYSE: NI) to release Q3 financial results on Oct 30 and host conference call at 11 a.m. ET. More details at website.
news.summary: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) from Merrillville, Indiana, has scheduled a conference call on October 30, 2024, at 11 a.m. ET (10 a.m. CT) to discuss its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 and offer a business update. The company will disclose these results before the U.S. financial markets open on the same day. To listen to the live conference call, interested individuals can access the NiSource website on October 30.

news.headline: Global Marine Buoy Market expected to reach US$ 1,486.3 million by 2034, growing at 4.9% CAGR. US leads with 72.4% share in 2024.
news.summary: The global Marine Buoy Market is set to reach US$ 921.2 million in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 4.9% through 2034, aiming for a valuation of US$ 1,486.3 million by 2034. The growth is attributed to maritime safety regulations, advancements in oil and gas development, and increasing demand for shipping. Marine buoys serve as navigational aids and ensure safety in the maritime industry. North America's market is expected to grow at 5.1%, with the US holding 72.4% of the market in 2024. China is also anticipated to have a significant market share at 56.9% in 2024. Companies worldwide are investing in research, navigation, and sensor technology to capitalize on this expanding industry.

news.headline: TAILG showcases 20+ electric vehicle models at 136th Canton Fair in Guangzhou, China, impressing attendees.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on October 16, 2024, the 136th Canton Fair commenced with much excitement. TAILG, a leading innovator in long-range electric vehicles, presented over 20 top-selling models at the biggest booth in the sector. Additionally, the company established key strategic partnerships while participating in the event.

news.headline: CGI extends e-ID partnership with Swedish Tax Agency. Key: CGI (NYSE: GIB), partnership agreement.
news.summary: Today, on October 16, 2024, CGI, a leading global IT and business consulting firm with stock market symbols GIB.A on the TSX and GIB on the NYSE, revealed they have secured a deal with the Swedish Tax Agency. This agreement marks a significant milestone for the company, known for its innovative solutions in the industry. With a strong presence in the market, CGI continues to expand its reach by partnering with key entities like the Swedish Tax Agency to provide cutting-edge services.

news.headline: Legal-Bay Pre Settlement Funding streamlines application for Wyoming plaintiffs; hires staff, launches new website. Oct 16, 2024.
news.summary: A leading lawsuit loan company in the country has introduced a new website and expanded its team to fast-track loan applications. Based in CHEYENNE, Wyo., the company, Legal-Bay Pre Settlement Funding, made the announcement on Oct. 16, 2024, as per PRNewswire. They are reaching out to plaintiffs in Wyoming, particularly in areas like Laramie and Yellowstone. This initiative aims to cater to a larger number of clients and streamline the process of obtaining lawsuit loans.

news.headline: Polymer foam market to reach $142.02 billion by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™. Various resin types & end-use industries involved.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the Polymer Foam Market was released. The report covers various aspects including Resin Type such as PU, PS, PO, Phenolic, Foam Type including Rigid and Flexible, and End-Use Industries like Building & Construction, Packaging, Automotive, Furniture & Bedding, Footwear, Sports, and Recreational sectors. The study delves into different regions to provide a comprehensive analysis. This market analysis encompasses crucial data on the industry, with a focus on resin types such as PU, PS, PO, and Phenolic. Moreover, it evaluates foam types, highlighting both rigid and flexible categories. The report also outlines the significance of various end-use industries including Building & Construction, Packaging, Automotive, Furniture & Bedding, Footwear, as well as Sports and Recreational sectors. Additionally, it analyzes the market across different regions to offer valuable insights.

news.headline: Kennametal (NYSE: KMT) to host Q1 FY2025 earnings call on Nov 6. Press release and presentation available on company's website.
news.summary: Kennametal Inc. (NYSE: KMT), based in Pittsburgh, announced that it will be conducting its first quarter fiscal year 2025 earnings call on November 6th. The press release and accompanying presentation will be posted on the company's website before the market opens on the same day. All interested individuals can access the information. The specific details regarding the conference call schedule were not provided in the brief.

news.headline: Nova Minerals drills 39m @ 5.4 g/t Au at Estelle Gold Project in Alaska - part of a shallow drilling program.
news.summary: In Anchorage, Alaska on October 16, 2024, Nova Minerals Limited (NASDAQ: NVA) (ASX: NVA) (FRA: QM3) reported the discovery of high-grade thick intercepts in seven additional holes as part of a 21-hole reverse circulation (RC) drilling initiative within the Estelle Gold Project, spanning over 500km2 in the Tintina Gold Belt in Alaska. The recent drilling program targeted near-surface mineralization at depths less than 50m to support the ongoing Feasibility Study for the RPM starter mine.

news.headline: Kraken Robotics receives $13 million in orders for subsea batteries, offering higher energy density and lighter weight.
news.summary: Kraken Robotics Inc., headquartered in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, shared on October 16, 2024 that it secured orders worth $13 million for SeaPowerTM subsea batteries from its current clients. These batteries, designed for depths up to 6,000 meters, offer double the energy density and are 46% lighter per kWh compared to conventional pressure-housed batteries. The company's stock is listed as TSX-V: PNG and OTCQB: KRKNF.

news.headline: Akamai integrates new Behavioral DDoS Engine into App & API Protector for enhanced detection and mitigation. (Character count: 144)
news.summary: A cutting-edge solution utilizes machine learning and worldwide intelligence to strengthen protection against application-layer DDoS attacks. Developed by Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), a cloud company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, this innovation aims to bolster detection and mitigation capabilities. This advancement signifies a significant step towards improved security measures in the face of cyber threats.

news.headline: J.B. Hunt stock surges premarket as Q3 operating revenue fell 3% Y/Y to $3.07 billion, beating expected $3.02 billion.
news.summary: Shares of J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT) are on the rise following the release of its third-quarter results. The company reported a 3% year-over-year decrease in operating revenue to $3.07 billion, surpassing the expected $3.02 billion. This decline was primarily attributed to a 5% decrease in gross revenue per load in Intermodal (JBI) and a 6% drop in Truckload (JBT) revenue compared to the previous year. Furthermore, load volumes decreased by 10% in Integrated Capacity Solutions (ICS) and 6% in Dedicated Contract Services (DCS). For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Northern Mexico seeks to become a nearshoring hub by attracting investments and integrating into global value chains, aiming to benefit from new government policies.
news.summary: In Chihuahua, Mexico, a primary focus as of October 16, 2024, is not merely boosting investment in the region but also fortifying the ecosystem and aligning it with worldwide value chains. This objective aligns with the potential under a fresh federal government and the current trend of economic development.

news.headline: Local Hive™ launches Organic Hive™ Honey at Albertsons, sourced from beekeepers in NE Brazil. USDA Organic, raw & unfiltered. GREELEY, Colo., Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Local Hive™, headquartered in Greeley, Colorado, announced on October 16, 2024, that they are now offering USDA Certified Organic, raw & unfiltered honey sourced from beekeepers in Northeast Brazil. With a commitment to providing high-quality honey, this new addition to their product line aims to offer consumers a premium choice.

news.headline: Czech official urges for increased rate cuts to boost economy.
Insured losses to onshore property from Hurricane Milton estimated to be between $30B and $50B by Verisk.
Healthtech sector investment rebounds to $3.5-4.5B per quarter, surpassing pre-pandemic levels, per SVB report.
news.summary: Investments in the healthtech sector have exceeded pre-pandemic levels, showing a stabilization between $3.5 billion and $4.5 billion per quarter in 2024. This trend indicates a recalibration in valuations within the industry, pointing towards an early recovery with significant investments.

news.headline: Avia's survey finds mobile gamers enjoy both trick-or-treating and playing games on Halloween. Launches Season 5 events.
news.summary: Avia is actively involving its player community to collect eerie details about Halloween and exciting gameplay experiences. The company has rolled out Season 5 of Halloween-themed in-game events in San Mateo, California. The launch took place on October 16, 2024. Avia, known for its acclaimed mobile gaming apps, aims to bring a thrilling Halloween experience to its users.

news.headline: Animoca Brands CEO predicts all Web3 projects will integrate Telegram; highlights its significance in mass adoption.
news.summary: Robby Yung, CEO of Animoca Brands, views Telegram gaming as indicative of broad acceptance, illustrating a trend towards mass adoption. Yung highlights the potential for more projects to join the platform, with a focus on expanding its reach to a larger audience.

news.headline: US economy is increasingly unwelcoming to parents, with childcare costs soaring 65% in last decade, benefitting corporations.
Thomas Leslie of Greenberg Traurig named to City & State's 2024 'Hudson Valley Power 100' list.
news.summary: Recognized on City & State's 2024 "Hudson Valley Power 100" list is Thomas Leslie, a founding shareholder at the Greenberg Traurig, LLP office in Westchester County. The announcement was made on October 15, 2024, in New York. It highlights Leslie's influential position in the region and his significant impact on the legal landscape. This acknowledgment underscores his role within the legal sector and further cements his reputation as a prominent figure.

news.headline: Dr. Ming-Chien Chyu joins Forbes Technology Council for elite tech executives. BOSTON, Oct. 15, 2024.
news.summary: The Forbes Technology Council is an exclusive group comprising elite senior-level executives in the field of technology, including CIOs and CTOs. On October 15, 2024, in Boston, Dr. Ming-Chien Chyu, the Founding President and Executive Director of the Healthcare Engineering Alliance, made significant announcements related to the organization.

news.headline: Well Infused wins Zenoti's Deep End competition at Innergize 2024 with data-driven health approach at beauty summit.
news.summary: During Zenoti's yearly beauty and wellness summit, the top spot was secured by Well Infused for its cutting-edge data-centered and personalized healthcare approach within a spa environment. Held in Las Vegas on October 15, 2024, Zenoti crowned Well Infused as the champion of its first-ever Deep End competition. This contest, serving as a platform for innovation and growth, showcased the exceptional strategies and practices of Well Infused in the spa industry.

news.headline: Greenberg Traurig adds renowned banking, finance lawyer Riccardo Agostinelli and three partners to Milan office, expanding team to 4.
news.summary: Greenberg Traurig Santa Maria in Milan is experiencing growth with the recent inclusion of a team comprising three partners, spearheaded by Riccardo Agostinelli. Agostinelli is a prominent figure in the banking and finance realm, with expertise in various areas such as leveraged finance, acquisition finance, corporate finance, real estate finance, sports finance, as well as special situations and debt. This addition of three partners further strengthens the team at Greenberg Traurig Santa Maria in Milan.

news.headline: Sandler Partners recognizes top industry organizations at their 2024 National Summit, awards given at closing gala.
news.summary: The 2024 National Summit organized by Sandler Partners, a leading independent technology distributor, concluded with a closing gala and dinner held in Redondo Beach, California on October 15, 2024. The event saw the recognition of top industry organizations with prestigious awards. The summit honored outstanding achievements and contributions within the technology sector.

news.headline: Author Sally Sanders shares stories from Costa Rican children's home in book "Sowing Priceless Seeds: Treasured Joys and Tears of the Lighthouse" priced at $22.49.
news.summary: Xulon Press is showcasing real-life accounts from a children's home in Costa Rica. In an announcement made in Groveland, Florida on October 16, 2024, Author Sally Sanders uncovers the stories of the children she encountered in her book titled "Sowing Priceless Seeds: Treasured Joys and Tears of the Lighthouse," priced at $22.49.

news.headline: Author Noel P. Fuller promotes spiritual growth through "Miracles Can Be Yours"($15.49) in ROCK HILL, S.C., inspired by God's instructions in his word.
news.summary: Author Noel P. Fuller's book, "Miracles Can Be Yours," is being showcased by Xulon Press in Rock Hill, South Carolina. Released on October 16, 2024, the book aims to inspire spiritual growth in readers by delving into the depths of a meaningful connection with Christ. Priced at $15.49, this work offers guidance for those seeking a closer relationship to their faith. Noel P. Fuller's insights provide an opportunity for individuals to explore a more profound faith journey.
